form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months won by 1.3 len at this track 0 - 62 March 26 over 1400m on a heavy track defeating Honey Maker with 58kg at $4.20. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at Sale Mdn-Sw on September 14 over 1611m, 3.5 len behind Kakkoii with 59.5kg at $6. Hard to tip against him on that sort of form. Drawn to effect and can prove too quick again.
